mapper.update: update community_electricity_fee set user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_room = #{userRoom}, read_month = #{readMonth}, last_reading = #{lastReading}, current_reading = #{currentReading}, surplus_electricity = #{surplusElectricity}, used_amount = #{usedAmount}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, total_fee = #{totalFee}, balance = #{balance}, fee_status = #{feeStatus}, due_date = #{dueDate}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, payment_no = #{paymentNo}, overdue_amount = #{overdueAmount}, reader = #{reader}, read_time = #{readTime}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where electricity_id = #{electricityId}
mapper.insert: insert into community_electricity_fee ( user_id, user_name, user_room, read_month, last_reading, current_reading, surplus_electricity, used_amount, unit_price, total_fee, balance, fee_status, due_date, payment_time, payment_no, overdue_amount, reader, read_time, create_time, update_time, remark ) values ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userRoom}, #{readMonth}, #{lastReading}, #{currentReading}, #{surplusElectricity}, #{usedAmount}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalFee}, #{balance}, #{feeStatus}, #{dueDate}, #{paymentTime}, #{paymentNo}, #{overdueAmount}, #{reader}, #{readTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
